name: Nippon Soda Co., Ltd.
summary: Nippon Soda Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells chemicals, agrochemicals, and other products in Japan and internationally. It operates through Chemicals, Agro Products, Trading, Construction, Transportation/Warehousing, and Other divisions. The company offers agrochemicals, including fungicides, insecticides, acaricides, and herbicides. It also provides organic titanate; magnesium ethylate; liquid-1, 2-polybutadiene; o-tolidine diisocyanate; adhesive agents for film lamination; photo resist base resins; developers for thermal paper; epoxy catalyst; permethyl polysilane; crown ethers; photo catalysts; 2, 2' - dichlorodiethy ether; triglycol dichloride; ethylene dichloride; bactericides; fungicides/algaecides; fungicides for wood; insecticides; and termiticide. In addition, the company offers pharmaceutical ingredients, intermediates, and additives comprising diaminomaleonitril, 5-methyl pyrazine-2-canboxylic acid, imidazoles, pyrazines, and hydroxypropyl cellulose; and eco business and consumer chemicals, such as calcium hypochlorite, uroliths removers, and chelating agents for heavy metal, as well as treatment systems by dechlorination for PCBs. Further, it provides chlor-alkali products comprising caustic soda, caustic potash, potassium carbonate, hydrochloric acid, chlorine, sodium hypochlorite, sodium metal, sodium alcoholates, sodium cyanide, potassium cyanide, sulphur monochloride, aluminum chloride anhydrous, phosphorus oxychloride, phosphorus trichloride, sodium sulfite, sulfur trioxide, and sulfuric acid. Additionally, the company engages in the trade of chemicals, functional products, synthetic resins, industrial machines and devices, and construction products; transportation and warehousing of chemicals and hazardous items; plant construction and civil engineering activities; and provision of non-ferrous metals and industrial waste treatment solutions. Nippon Soda Co., Ltd. was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
